headline: BTIG Reiterates Buy on Booking Holdings, Maintains $250 Price Target
summary: BTIG  analyst Jake Fuller   reiterates Booking Holdings (NASDAQ:BKNG) with a Buy and maintains $250 price target.

raw.headline: BTIG Reiterates Buy on Booking Holdings, Maintains $250 Price Target

headline: Agoda Recommends Destinations with Water Parks Worth Traveling For
summary: Travelers looking to beat the summer heat can find refreshing escapes with digital travel platform Agoda's recommendations for destinations featuring water parks in Asia. These locations promise family fun for all ages, offering a splash of excitement and relaxation.
